track: A1b — novelty-leg DECISION ablation: genetic/eQTL FUSION vs calibration-alone (trust-only PRESCRIBE-analog)
honesty_contract: Referee+rules hash-frozen BEFORE scoring (prereg d7896ab2). Real committed gate reproduced (49/98 universe GO — EXACT match to day8 committed run). Trust from committed pooled-proxy trust.py path. This is a HONEST NULL, reported plainly.

referee.label: y_mouse_immune (mouse-KO IMMUNE/hematopoietic phenotype, IMPC/MGI via Open Targets)
referee.held_out: Gate rule NEVER used mouse phenotype data; mouse germline KO is an orthogonal model system -> validation CAN fail.

trust_floor_finding: All 98 universe genes have trust in [0.71,0.99] -> committed MIN_TRUST_SCORE=0.50 is NON-BINDING at scale. Literal trust-only rule = GO-all (base-rate predictor). Fair head-to-head uses matched-budget top-k trust.
why_fusion_doesnt_help_here: The eQTL>0 leg (meant to add rigor) rejects bona-fide immune genes lacking a significant T-cell cis-eQTL in the queried datasets (IL10, PTPN2, RASGRP1, GATA3 — all mouse-immune-positive, eqtl_nsig=0), while the mouse-immune referee also flags metabolic genes with incidental hematopoietic phenotypes (FTO, PPARG) as positive. Net: fusion's swaps are not better supported by THIS referee.
honest_verdict: NULL — against the held-out mouse-KO immune referee (n=22, 9 positives, base rate 0.41), the committed genetic/eQTL FUSION gate does NOT make better-supported GO calls than a matched-budget trust-only PRESCRIBE-analog: precision 0.273 vs 0.364 (fusion lower), and the two rules disagree on 10/22 genes but that disagreement is statistically indistinguishable from chance (permutation p=0.46). Neither rule beats the base rate; MCC negative for both. So on this orthogonal axis, fusing genetic evidence adds no value over calibration alone. CAVEAT (does NOT flip verdict, per honesty contract): this is ONE noisy referee at pilot n; the gate's genetic anchoring is separately validated against HUMAN genetics/eQTL-direction and clinical-trial outcome direction (day8 gate MCC=0.488). The honest, publishable claim is: the value of the committed gate's fusion is demonstrated on HUMAN orthogonal axes, NOT on mouse-KO immune phenotype, where it is null.
small_n_caveat: n=22 overlap, 9 positives; single referee. Report as pilot. Wide CIs; no general-capability claim.

inputs.trust: committed src/trustlayer/trust.py pooled-proxy path on data/interim/day2_feature_table.parquet
